The Real Problem

Your business is great.
Your Instagram doesn't show it.

For founder-led, service-based businesses, Instagram should be your highest-leverage trust-building channel. Instead, it's an afterthought — inconsistent, unfocused, and disconnected from your actual business goals.

📉
You're posting without a strategy
Random content, no clear funnel, no defined audience. You're creating content for the sake of it — not to move people from discovery to booked appointment. Without a strategy, every post is a guess.
🎯
Your content doesn't convert
Before-and-afters, promos, and product shots aren't enough. Today's buyers need to trust you before they book. If your content isn't building credibility, educating your audience, and driving clear action — it's not working.
⏱️
You don't have time to do it right
You're running a business. Social media is a full-time job. Trying to do both means neither gets done well. The brands winning on Instagram aren't doing it themselves — they have a system and a team behind it.
🔍
You have no idea what's actually working
Without a performance framework, you're flying blind. You can't optimize what you don't measure — and most agencies don't measure the right things. Vanity metrics (likes, followers) don't pay the bills. Reach, engagement rate, and conversion signals do.
🏷️
You blend in instead of standing out
In crowded niches — med spas, fitness studios, jewelry, real estate — every brand looks the same. Generic content, same hooks, same formats. Your brand has a real story and real expertise. Your Instagram should reflect that — and make the right people stop scrolling.
🔄
Past agencies didn't deliver
You've tried it before. You hired someone who posted pretty pictures, sent a monthly report full of numbers that didn't matter, and never really understood your business. You're not skeptical of social media — you're skeptical of agencies that don't treat it like a growth channel.
The businesses winning on social aren't posting more.
They're thinking differently about what they post, why they post it, and who they're posting it for.
That's the difference between content that fills a feed and content that builds a business.
Who We Are

Built at the crossroads of
simplicity and data.

Scroll Media exists at the intersection of two things most agencies get wrong separately: simplifying social media so it's actually executable, and grounding every decision in data so it actually performs. We become a true extension of your brand — not a vendor you manage, but a strategic partner you rely on.

01
We Start by Listening — Deep Brand Immersion
Before we write a single caption or build a single strategy, we send you a detailed onboarding form covering your brand story, business goals, audience, competitors, and tone of voice. We don't guess — we learn. Then we audit your current social profiles and use our strategic framework to shape a clear, simple strategy that is effective and produces real results. We become a true extension of your brand.
02
We Master One Channel — Instagram-First Philosophy
We specialize on Instagram — and that's intentional. We believe in mastering attention on the channel with the highest opportunity for your business. Instagram is where your ideal buyer discovers brands, researches services, and makes decisions. We go deep where it matters most and build a compounding presence that actually drives results — not a scattered multi-platform approach that delivers nothing everywhere.
03
We Build Around Your Audience — Goal-Mapped Strategy & IVP
Every strategy is anchored to a specific Ideal Viewer Profile — a detailed portrait of the exact person your content is designed to reach. We develop no more than two IVPs per account and map every content pillar, post format, and CTA directly to your business goals. No generic content. No guessing. Every post has a purpose, a target, and a measurable outcome.
04
We Apply Human Psychology — Psychology-Driven Content
Trust, social proof, authority, scarcity, and identity — these are the levers that move people from passive viewers to active buyers. Every content decision we make is grounded in how people actually think and behave online. We walk your viewer through a clear purchasing journey from first discovery to booked appointment, using psychology to drive action at every step.
05
We Evolve & Execute — Data-Driven. Done-For-You.
Monthly performance reports, strategic adjustments, content creation, copywriting, scheduling, and community management — all handled. We track 13 core metrics across reach, engagement, and conversion. We share the data, make the adjustments, and keep the strategy evolving. You run your business. We handle the rest.
How We Work

Two phases. One clear path
to real growth.

We don't just manage your social media — we build a growth engine. Every engagement starts with a dedicated strategy month to build the foundation right — then moves into execution. No guessing, no wasted spend.

1
Phase 1 — Build the Strategy
Month 1 (3-Week Strategy Engagement)
  • 60-minute onboarding strategy call
  • Full brand audit & competitor analysis
  • Ideal Viewer Profile (IVP) development
  • Content pillar strategy (mapped to your business goals)
  • Custom keyword bank & Social SEO setup
  • Profile optimization (bio, highlights, link-in-bio)
  • Content calendar delivered & approved
  • Shot list prepared for first content shoot
→ Deliverable: A complete, approved strategy document and content system ready for execution
2
Phase 2 — Execute & Grow
Month 2+ (Monthly Execution Retainer)
  • Monthly on-site content shoots (every 3 weeks)
  • Content creation: Reels, carousels, statics
  • Copy & Social SEO optimization on every post
  • Content approvals & scheduling
  • Full community management & engagement
  • Monthly performance report (13 metrics)
  • Strategic recommendations & adjustments
  • Bi-weekly 30-min touchpoint calls
→ Deliverable: Consistent, high-quality content that compounds — every month builds on the last
Activity Month 1 — Build the Strategy Month 2+ — Execute & Grow

The Offer

One package. Built for
serious growth.

Strategy → Content → Performance. All handled. Strategy month builds the foundation. Execution retainer compounds the results.

The people behind

Chase Gianattasio
Founder & Chief Strategist
Chase built Scroll Media on the belief that most businesses are one clear strategy away from turning Instagram into a real growth channel. Allison
Head of Content & Account Management
Allison leads content creation and day-to-day account management for Scroll Media's client roster.
